title: Nuke'd
description: a mod with more TNT, Right now just ONE
body:
This Mod is in Alpha and can have some bugs, but it will be fixed
-

This Mod adds one new TNT block called N.U.K and is just like a Nuke and a Command to make Spheres _(wich i used to make the hole)_
